news.title: Google just declared itself a contender in AI design at IO 2026
news.summary: Google says it's designed the app to be accessible to everyone, from teachers to small business owners.

news.title: You can now talk to your Gmail inbox, as seen at Google IO 2026
news.summary: Google expands Gmail’s AI Inbox with conversational voice search, letting users ask Gemini to find buried email details.

news.title: How to use Google’s new AI agents to go beyond your standard searches
news.summary: Google is launching AI-powered “information agents” that can monitor topics in the background and proactively alert users to updates and changes.

news.title: Discord enables end-to-end encrypted voice and video calling for every user
news.summary: Good news! Discord's hundreds of millions of users now have their communications scrambled, so not even Discord can see them.

news.title: Mach Industries just spent $50M to solve a major defense tech problem
news.summary: Mach says the acquisition meaningfully improves unit economics across its five vehicle programs at exactly the moment the company is starting to scale.

news.title: Wear OS 7 will keep track of deliveries and sports scores on your wrist
news.summary: Amid the flurry of today's Google I/O announcements, Google shared details about Wear OS 7, the next major update to its smartwatch platform. To help you keep track of things like deliveries and sports scores, Wear OS 7 will get the iPhone-style Live Updates that were introduced on Android last year

news.title: Plex is tripling the price of a lifetime pass to $750 after doubling it last year
news.summary: I am dying to know how much money Plex is about to make the next six weeks charging people to stream their own video from their own homes. news.title: The future of Google is a search box that does everything

news.summary: FBI will pay vendors to help it track and search for vehicles nationwide.

news.summary: Plex says that it has considered getting rid of Lifetime Passes.

news.title: Two AI-based science assistants succeed with drug-retargeting tasks
news.summary: Both tools generate hypotheses; one goes on to analyze some of the data.

news.title: Literary Prizewinners Are Facing AI Allegations. It Feels Like the New Normal
news.summary: Three of five regional winners of the prestigious Commonwealth Short Story Prize are suspected of relying on chatbots. They’re certainly not alone.

news.title: California’s Wildfire Season Is Already Overactive
news.summary: Major fires are threatening homes and ecologically sensitive areas following a hot, dry winter.

news.title: Everything Announced at Google I/O 2026: Gemini, Search, Smart Glasses
news.summary: Google is sprucing up its Gemini models, revamping search, and enabling AI agents in everything. There are also some spiffy new smart glasses coming this fall.

news.title: Meta Employees Are Scrambling to Use Up Benefits Ahead of Layoffs
news.summary: On the eve of about 8,000 jobs being cut, employees are cashing in on headphone stipends and other perks while they still can.

news.title: Google Search Goes Agentic—and Doesn’t Need You Anymore
news.summary: Vibe-coded results! Super widgets! Bots that never sleep! Google’s vision for the future of Search is hyper-personalized, automated, and extremely AI.
